globalStyle: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 loose side-view foliage with binary alpha and broad readable clusters.

briefs.subject: Loose Oak Leaf Canopy
briefs.prompt: Create an original loose oak-leaf 16-mask YjsE autotile sheet with large readable clusters and transparent exposed air gaps.
requirements: Export exactly sixteen 16x16 frames in top-right-bottom-left mask order 0-15.
Use binary alpha only and preserve transparent exposed corners and boundaries.
Connect matching sides through at least a stable five-pixel leaf bridge and suppress dark outlines on declared connections so interior tiles read as one canopy mass.
Use the forest green palette without raster scaling, filtering or third-party source material.
